nasb.text: Your lewdness will be requited upon you, and you will bear the penalty of worshiping your idols; thus you will know that I am the Lord God.’ ”

esv.text: And they shall return your lewdness upon you, and you shall bear the penalty for your sinful idolatry, and you shall know that I am the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 人要把你們行淫的報應歸在你們身上；你們要擔當你們拜偶像的罪；你們就知道我是主耶和華。”

ccb.text: 她们淫乱，必得报应；她们拜偶像，必受惩罚。这样，你们就知道我是主耶和华。’”
